mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user_role SET deleted = 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_user_role (user_id, role_id, status, deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{userId}, #{roleId}, 1, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1
